title: ceratocephalus tenellus
intro: Ceratocephalus tenellus is a type of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the bog cotton or bog cotton grass. It is native to the bogs and marshes of Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratocephalus tenellus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
